title: Kai's Garden Discovery
synopsis: When Kai feels scared about starting at a new preschool, his teacher Ms. Rosa shows him the school garden where he discovers beautiful butterflies and makes a new friend, helping him feel brave and happy about his new school adventure.

pages.text: Kai held Mama's hand tight. Today was his first day at the new preschool. His tummy felt funny and his eyes looked worried. "I feel scared, Mama," Kai whispered softly.

illustration.description: A young Asian boy with short black hair wearing a bright blue backpack stands next to his mother outside a colorful preschool building. His expression shows worry with wide eyes and a slightly downturned mouth. His mother, wearing a warm yellow dress, gently holds his hand. The background shows a cheerful school entrance with rainbow decorations.
illustration.alt: Kai looking worried while holding his mother's hand outside preschool

pages.text: Ms. Rosa, his new teacher, came to greet them. She had kind brown eyes and wore a sunshine-yellow apron covered in flower patches. "Hello, Kai! I'm so happy to meet you," she said with a warm smile.

illustration.description: A friendly Latina teacher with curly brown hair tied back wearing a bright yellow apron decorated with colorful flower patches. She's crouching down to Kai's eye level with her arms open in a welcoming gesture. Her expression is warm and inviting with gentle eyes and a genuine smile. The background shows a cozy classroom with nature posters.
illustration.alt: Ms. Rosa greeting Kai with open arms and a warm smile

pages.text: Inside the classroom, Kai saw other children playing. But he still felt scared and stayed close to the door. His hands were shaky and his heart beat fast. Everything seemed so big and new.

illustration.description: Kai standing hesitantly by the classroom door with his shoulders hunched and hands clasped together nervously. In the background, diverse children are playing with blocks and toys - a Black girl with pigtails, a boy with freckles, and others. The classroom is bright with primary colors but Kai appears small and uncertain in the foreground.
illustration.alt: Kai looking nervous while other children play in the background

pages.text: Ms. Rosa noticed Kai felt scared. "Would you like to see something special?" she asked gently. She led Kai outside to the school garden. Kai's eyes grew wide with wonder.

illustration.description: Ms. Rosa holding Kai's hand as they walk through a wooden garden gate. The garden is bursting with bright colors - red tomatoes, orange marigolds, and green leafy plants. Kai's expression is changing from worry to curiosity, his mouth slightly open in surprise. Sunlight streams through the scene with a golden glow.
illustration.alt: Ms. Rosa leading Kai into a colorful school garden

pages.text: In the garden, beautiful orange and black butterflies danced around the bright flowers. Kai watched them flutter and felt amazed. "They're so pretty!" he said, forgetting to feel scared.

illustration.description: Kai reaching out toward three orange and black monarch butterflies floating among tall sunflowers and purple cosmos flowers. His expression shows pure delight with bright eyes and an open-mouthed smile of wonder. The butterflies have detailed wing patterns and appear to be dancing in the air. The background is filled with vibrant garden colors.
illustration.alt: Kai watching beautiful butterflies in the garden with wonder

pages.text: A girl with bouncy curls came over. "Hi! I'm Maya. Do you like butterflies too?" she asked with a big smile. Kai nodded and smiled back. He felt happy for the first time today.

illustration.description: Maya, a cheerful Black girl with natural curly hair in a bright red dress, extends her hand toward Kai in friendship. Both children are smiling genuinely at each other among the garden flowers. Kai's posture is more relaxed now, and his expression shows the beginning of happiness. Butterflies continue to flutter around them in the background.
illustration.alt: Maya introducing herself to Kai in the garden

pages.text: Kai and Maya watched the butterflies together. Kai felt brave now, not scared anymore. "I like my new school," he told Maya. She clapped her hands with joy, and Kai felt very happy.

illustration.description: Kai and Maya sitting side by side on a small wooden bench in the garden, both pointing excitedly at butterflies above them. Kai's expression shows confidence and joy - no more worry lines, bright smile, relaxed shoulders. Maya is clapping her hands in celebration. The garden around them is alive with butterflies, flowers, and warm sunshine creating a magical, happy atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Kai and Maya sitting together happily watching butterflies

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Kai feel at the beginning of the story?
questions.explanation: Kai felt scared when he first arrived at his new preschool because everything was new and unfamiliar.

questions.question: What did Ms. Rosa show Kai to help him feel better?
questions.explanation: Ms. Rosa took Kai to see the special school garden with beautiful flowers and butterflies.

questions.question: What did Kai and Maya see in the garden?
questions.explanation: Kai and Maya watched beautiful orange and black butterflies dancing around the flowers.

questions.question: How did Kai feel at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: By the end, Kai felt happy and brave because he made a new friend and discovered the beautiful garden.

pages.title: Fill in the Missing Words
pages.text: Kai felt _____ on his first day. Ms. Rosa showed him the _____. The beautiful _____ made Kai feel happy.

pages.title: Complete the Story
pages.text: Maya was Kai's new _____. She had _____ curls. Together they felt _____ watching the butterflies.
